reminder.failedDelete: [REMINDER] Failed to delete reminder from store:
reminder.failedCleanup: [REMINDER] Failed to clean up dispatched reminder:

remindme.noInput:
❌ Please provide a time and reminder message.
Usage: `!remindme in 5 minutes Take a break`
Examples:
`!remindme in 30 minutes Check the oven`
`!remindme tomorrow at 9am Team meeting`
`!remindme in 2 hours Walk the dog`
remindme.invalidTime:
❌ Could not parse time. Try something like:
`in 5 minutes`, `tomorrow at 3pm`, `15 seconds`
remindme.pastTime: ❌ Time must be in the future.

thesaurus.noWord: Please provide a word to look up.
thesaurus.error: An error occurred while fetching the word definition.

translate.noInput: Please provide a language code and text. Example: `!translate es Hello` or `!translate fr:es Bonjour`

wiki.error: An error occurred while fetching the Wikipedia article.

roll.error: ❌ Invalid dice format. Try e.g. `2d20+6`, `d8`, or just `20`.

8ball.noQuestion:
🎱 Please ask a yes/no question.
Usage: `!8ball Will I win the lottery?`

wheelspin.noOptions:
❌ Please provide at least two options.
Usage: `!wheelspin pizza sushi tacos`

calc.noExpression:
❌ Please provide an expression to evaluate.
Usage: `!calc <expression>`
calc.invalidExpression: ❌ Invalid expression. Use numbers and operators like `+`, `-`, `*`, `/`, `^`, `()`

color.noColor:
❌ Please provide a hex color.
Usage: `!color FF5733`
color.invalid: ❌ Invalid hex color. Use format like `FF5733` or `#FF5733`.
color.parseError: Invalid hex color. Use format like FF5733 or #FF5733.

currency.noInput:
❌ Please provide an amount, source currency, and target currency.
Usage: `!currency 100 usd eur`

currency.error: An error occurred while fetching exchange rates.

echo.noInput:
❌ Please provide something to echo.
Usage: `!echo Hello, world!`

iss.error: An error occurred while fetching ISS data.

qrcode.noInput:
❌ Please provide text or a URL to encode.
Usage: `!qrcode https://example.com`
qrcode.tooLong: ❌ Input too long ({length} chars). Maximum is {max} characters.

timestamp.noInput:
❌ Please provide a date or time.
Usage: `!timestamp tomorrow at 3pm`
timestamp.invalid: ❌ Sorry, I couldn't understand that time format.

purge.discordOnly: ❌ The purge command is only available as a Discord slash command.
purge.notAvailable: ❌ Cannot purge messages in this channel.
purge.botMissingPerms: ❌ I need the **Manage Messages** permission to purge.

purge.tooMany: ❌ You can only purge up to **100** messages at a time.

rank.guildOnly: ❌ This command can only be used in a server.
rank.title: 📊 {username}
rank.noXp: This user hasn't earned any XP yet.

leaderboard.guildOnly: ❌ This command can only be used in a server.
leaderboard.noData: 📊 No XP data yet — start chatting to earn XP!
leaderboard.title: 📊 Server Leaderboard

xp.guildOnly: ❌ This command can only be used in a server.
xp.helpDescription:
**Subcommands:**
`xp set <user> <amount>` — Set a user's XP (admin)
`xp add <user> <amount>` — Add XP to a user (admin)
`xp globalnotify [on/off]` — Toggle server announcements (admin)
`xp bonus add <word> <xp>` — Add keyword bonus (admin)
`xp bonus remove <word>` — Remove keyword bonus (admin)
`xp bonus list` — List all keyword bonuses
xp.unknownSubcommand: ❌ Unknown subcommand `{sub}`. Use `!xp` to see available commands.
xp.noPermission: ❌ You don't have permission to use this subcommand.
xp.invalidAmount: ❌ Invalid XP amount. Please provide a positive number.
xp.addResult: ✅ Added **{amount} XP** to <@{userId}> — now at **{xp} XP** (Level {level}) {levelNote}
xp.bonusNoBonuses: 📝 No keyword bonuses configured for this server.

levelnotify.guildOnly: ❌ This command can only be used in a server.
